source.title: What is the reward for enlisting a Claim Stake?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “What is the reward for enlisting a Claim Stake?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
When you enlist a Claim Stake in Faction Claims on Play.StarAtlas.com, you begin generating R4 resources, the essential materials needed to fuel most economic and gameplay loops in Star Atlas.
What Rewards Do I Earn?
Once enlisted, your Claim Stake produces four types of R4 resources:
Fuel
Food
Ammunition
Toolkits
These resources are automatically generated over time and can be claimed directly to your wallet.
What Determines the Amount of Rewards?
The tier of your Claim Stake determines how much R4 you earn:
Higher-tier Claim Stakes (Tier 2–5) generate greater quantities of R4 per hour.
Lower-tier Claim Stakes (Tier 1) produce less but require lower upfront investment.
Each Claim Stake is limited to producing R4 only when actively enlisted in Faction Claims. You can view and manage your enlisted stakes here: https://play.staratlas.com/claims
R4 Emission Rates by Tier
Here's how much R4 each Claim Stake Tier generates per day:
Tier
Ammo
Food
Fuel
Toolkits
1
1,426
1,454
2,160
2,102
2
12,384
11,923
11,002
12,485
3
25,546
24,883
28,682
26,496
4
82,296
77,889
82,296
74,952
5
272,808
268,344
214,675
263,894
The higher the tier, the greater the daily output of resources
💡 Important: Claim Stakes will stop generating R4 once their storage capacity is full. Be sure to claim your rewards regularly to avoid production halts.
Why Is R4 Important?
R4 (Fuel, Food, Ammunition, and Toolkits) is essential to many gameplay systems in Star Atlas and represents the foundation of the in-game economy.
You’ll need R4 to:
Maintain your fleet in Faction Fleet
Craft items and components in SAGE
Operate and upkeep Starbases
If you don't produce R4 through Claim Stakes, you can still buy or sell it directly on the Star Atlas Marketplace or craft them in Sage
R4 is always in demand and managing it well is key to maximizing your long-term gameplay and earnings
